title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You totally crushed it! Look how cute they
all are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I shouldn't have doubted you. I guess everyone
has at least one thing they're good at.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, just kidding! Sorry, got a little carried away
there. But you were, like, legit fire!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna take good care of them. Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't act all weird. I say thanks like
everyone else!
